category_title: Students with complex learning and behavioral disabilities (developmental delay)
minimal_context: The student is drawing a picture and writing a short sentence to label it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You can draw a picture now and then label it with a short sentence.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Draws and colours a picture) I am done drawing.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please write a short sentence to label your drawing.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Writes the short sentence to label the drawing, but forms the letters the wrong way round) Here is my sentence.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: You can draw a picture now and then label it with a short sentence.

STUDENT: (Draws and colours a picture) I am done drawing.

TUTOR: Please write a short sentence to label your drawing.

STUDENT: I will write the label.

TUTOR: Keep going.

STUDENT: (Writes the short sentence to label the drawing, but forms the letters the wrong way round) Here is my sentence.

task.content: Express herself through drawings and labelling them with short sentences

context.materials: Drawings, mirror, worksheets with dotted letters

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When labelling drawings with short sentences
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Often form letters wrong way round
